  C00000:                 .I16
  C00000: 9C 0C 28        STZ ENTITY_DRAW_SORTING
  C00003: A2 0C 28        LDX #.LOWORD(ENTITY_DRAW_SORTING)

>>> bankconfig/US/bank00.asm
  C0AD56:             .INCLUDE "unknown/C0/C0AD56.asm"
>>> unknown/C0/C0AD56.asm
  C0AD56:             ; Parses a [00 CC] [XX XX] style script.
  C0AD56:             ; CC 01 - Stores XXXX to [$ACCUM + $88]
  C0AD56:             ; CC 02 - Returns XXXX
  C0AD56:             ; CC 03 - Jumps to XXXX
  C0AD56:             UNKNOWN_C0AD56:
  C0AD56: 18              CLC
  C0AD57: 65 88           ADC $88
  C0AD59: AA              TAX
  C0AD5A: A0 00 00        LDY #$0000
  C0AD5D:             @NEXTCMD:
  C0AD5D: B7 02           LDA [$02],Y
  C0AD5F: C8              INY
  C0AD60: C8              INY
  C0AD61: C9 01 00        CMP #$0001
  C0AD64: D0 09           BNE @NOTCMD1
  C0AD66: B7 02           LDA [$02],Y
  C0AD68: C8              INY
  C0AD69: C8              INY
  C0AD6A: 9D 00 00        STA __BSS_START__,X
  C0AD6D: 80 EE           BRA @NEXTCMD
  C0AD6F:             @NOTCMD1:
  C0AD6F: C9 03 00        CMP #$0003
  C0AD72: D0 09           BNE @CMD2
  C0AD74: B7 02           LDA [$02],Y
  C0AD76: 85 02           STA $02
  C0AD78: A0 00 00        LDY #$0000
  C0AD7B: 80 E0           BRA @NEXTCMD
  C0AD7D:             @CMD2:
  C0AD7D: B7 02           LDA [$02],Y
  C0AD7F: C8              INY
  C0AD80: C8              INY
  C0AD81: 84 08           STY $08
  C0AD83: A8              TAY
  C0AD84: A5 02           LDA $02
  C0AD86: 18              CLC
  C0AD87: 65 08           ADC $08
  C0AD89: 60              RTS

  C0FFD5: 31              .BYTE $31        ; HiROM + FastROM
  C0FFD6: 02              .BYTE $02        ; ROM only
  C0FFD7: 0C              .BYTE $0C        ; ROM Size = 0x300000
  C0FFD8: 03              .BYTE $03        ; RAM Size
  C0FFD9: 01              .BYTE $01        ; USA
  C0FFDA: 33              .BYTE $33        ; Licensee Code
  C0FFDB: 00              .BYTE $00        ; Version
  C0FFDC: B7 BF           .WORD $BFB7    ; Checksum Complement
  C0FFDE: 48 40           .WORD $4048    ; Checksum
  C0FFE0: 00 00           .WORD $0000    ; Unused
  C0FFE2: 00 00           .WORD $0000    ; Unused
  C0FFE4: FF 5F           .WORD $5FFF    ; Native-mode COP
  C0FFE6: FF 5F           .WORD $5FFF    ; Native-mode BRK
  C0FFE8: FF 5F           .WORD $5FFF    ; Native-mode ABORT
  C0FFEA: 47 81           .ADDR NMI_VECTOR    ; Native-mode NMI
  C0FFEC: 00 00           .WORD $0000    ; Native-mode RESET
  C0FFEE: 4B 81           .ADDR IRQ_VECTOR    ; Native-mode IRQ

  C0FFFE: FF 5F           .WORD $5FFF    ; Emulation-mode IRQ
